allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'chore: solution root files and central package/build configuration *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat\(shared\): SharedKernel primitives and Shared.Infrastructure *)
PowerShell(dotnet package search Microsoft.OpenApi --exact-match --format table 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern "^\\| Microsoft.OpenApi " | Where-Object { $_ -match "\\| 2\\." })
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat\(api\): host shell composition root *)
